CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(Step_Goal__r.GoalUnit__c), "Days", InitialTS__c + Step_Goal__r.GoalHandleTimeHrs__c, "Hours", InitialTS__c + (Step_Goal__r.GoalHandleTimeHrs__c/24), "Weekdays", DATETIMEVALUE(StartDate__c + Step_Goal__r.GoalHandleTimeHrs__c + CASE(MOD(StartDate__c - DATE(1900,1,7), 7), 6, 1, 3, 2, 4, 2, 5, 2, 0) ), NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Based on the goal, when this stage will be breached if not competed by this date/time
CustomField.label: Breach Happens At
